Hero.description: Explore the magic of our lands with absolute safety, comfort, and the distinction of an unforgettable journey.

About.subtitle: Get to Know Us
About.description: At <brand>Trip Craft MX</brand>, we are convinced that traveling transcends simple movement: it is about immersing yourself in experiences that awaken the senses, connect with cultural roots, and forge everlasting memories.
About.essense_description: We curate unique journeys that intertwine adventure, history, nature, and haute gastronomy.

CustomAdventure.upper_subtitle: Seeking a plan designed exclusively for you?
CustomAdventure.main_subtitle: We guide you through the process
CustomAdventure.question: Need more information or planning a group expedition?
CustomAdventure.contact_text: If you have inquiries about our services, require specific details about this journey, or are organizing a special group experience, please do not hesitate to <contact>contact us.</contact>

Mission.title: MISSION
Mission.description: To inspire every traveler to discover the mysticism of Mexico with absolute confidence, comfort, and a spirit of sophisticated adventure. We aspire for every experience to be the link between your curiosity and the vast cultural and natural richness that surrounds us.

Experiences.notice_description: The experience service <bold>does not include transfers to or from the meeting point</bold>. If required, such transportation must be coordinated and covered independently by the client. The company assumes no responsibility for delays, setbacks, or expenses derived from external transportation services.

hero.title: Expert Guidance
hero.description: We assist you in creating memorable journeys that balance adventure, history, nature, and fine dining.

modal.title: Request Received
modal.description: Shortly, we will send your folio number to proceed with the payment of your quote.

content.title: Need more information or planning a group adventure?
content.description: If you have inquiries about our services or seek specific details about a tour or group experience, we are here to serve you. Our concierge team will be delighted to provide personalized attention to help you organize a tailor-made adventure, aligned with your specific interests. Whether you are looking for a cultural immersion, a day exploring cenotes, or a unique combination of activities in Tulum and its surroundings, we are ready to design the perfect experience for you.

placeholders.details: E.g.: I require private transportation and a certified bilingual guide...

branding.subtitle: We are by your side to ensure every detail of your group experience is flawless.

messages.external: External folio detected. Please enter the agreed amount.

editorial.title: Service Description
editorial.subtitle: Need further assistance or planning a group event?
editorial.description: For any inquiries regarding our service standards or details on personalized itineraries, our team of experts is ready to offer tailor-made solutions, ensuring every second of your trip is extraordinary.

card.description: Live the intensity of football like an authentic local, integrating <bold>private transportation, taco tasting, drinks, and an exclusive souvenir</bold>. Immerse yourself in the stadium's excitement from start to finish, in a safe and genuine environment. During the World Cup, we offer exclusive broadcast zones with high-definition screens and an unparalleled festive atmosphere.

labels.name: Full Name
labels.details: Which match or football experience do you have in mind?

form.error_alert: Could not register the request at this time.

footer.question: Already have a quote for this experience?

success.title: Request Received!
success.description: We will contact you shortly with a personalized proposal and your payment folio.

branding.description: Enjoy football from a local perspective with transportation, typical gastronomy, and exclusive details. We are here to design the perfect match day for you and your companions.

editorial.title: Service Details
editorial.subtitle: Live football like a true local, enjoying <white>private transportation, gourmet tacos, drinks, and souvenirs.</white> Immerse yourself in the game's excitement from start to finish.
editorial.description: Likewise, during international events, we provide live broadcast experiences with cutting-edge technology and the best company, maintaining the vibrant energy of the stadium. A unique fusion of sports, gastronomy, and celebration.

alerts.select_date: Please select your preferred date for this adventure

guidelines.title: Booking Guidelines
guidelines.p1: All our experience services are <bold>subject to prior confirmation of availability</bold> by our team. Final validation will be sent once operational slots for the selected date are verified.
guidelines.options_title: In case of lack of space or technical unforeseen events on the requested date, the client may choose:
guidelines.option_a: Rescheduling to a <bold>new available date</bold> at no additional charge.
guidelines.option_b: Selection of an <bold>equivalent experience</bold> in the same area or with similar characteristics.

legal.label: Legal Notice
legal.text: In compliance with the Federal Consumer Protection Law, Trip Craft MX guarantees the right to clear information regarding service conditions. Any adjustment to the itinerary will always be made with the express consent of the booking holder.
